description: Destroy-capability. Pins the confirm-alone destroy gate and the bypassed delete DELETE. The group_id-required message diverges (Go 'group_id is required' vs Python 'group_id must be a positive integer'), so it is not pinned (see report).

cases.name: confirm alone hits the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_placement_group_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
